problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
